prestazioni: Engine swap to a Volvo B20E (2.0L inline-4, DOHC, 120 HP stock) with a custom billet crankshaft from **SCAT Enterprises** (88mm stroke, 2.2L displacement) and forged **JE Pistons** (8.5:1 compression ratio) for high-RPM reliability. Pair with **WebCam 280° duration camshafts** (custom grind for B20) and **Ferrea Racing** titanium valves (intake/exhaust) for reduced valvetrain mass.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) on a custom **Tial 38mm wastegate** setup, feeding into a **Spearco intercooler** (front-mount, 2.5" core) with **Silicone Intakes** 3" silicone hoses. Fueling handled by **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump**, **ID1000x injectors**, and a **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** for precise tuning.

Drivetrain upgrades include a **Volvo M41 4-speed transmission** with a **Centerforce DFX clutch** (triple-disc, 2,200 lb-ft torque capacity) and a **Quaife ATB differential** (80% lockup) for optimal power delivery. Suspension features **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (adjustable damping, 20mm drop) with **polyurethane bushings** from **Powerflex** (black series) and **Bilstein B14 struts** for rebound control.
estetica: Custom **Rocket Bunny** widebody kit (Pandem-style) with **Volvo Amazon-specific** fender flares (hand-rolled steel, 2" wider front/rear) and **carbon fiber side skirts** from **Seibon**. Rear diffuser integrated into the bumper with **3" exhaust outlets** (dual-tip, **Borla Pro XS** mufflers).

OEM+ restomod interior with **Recaro SRD** seats (Volvo Amazon-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in **Bridge of Weir leather** (tan with red stitching) and a **Momo Prototipo** steering wheel (380mm, quick-release hub). Dashboard retains original gauges but adds a **Defi Advance BF** boost gauge (52mm, pillar-mounted) and **AEM X-Series** wideband AFR display.

Exterior paint in **Volvo Amazon original "54 Dark Blue"** (PPG Deltron basecoat) with **3M Matte Clear** topcoat for a stealth OEM+ look. **Hella Rallye 1000** headlights (H4 conversion, Cibie lenses) and **Lucas Flamethrower** taillights (LED retrofitted) for period-correct aggression. Wheel setup: **BBS RS-GT** (15x8 ET20 front, 15x9 ET25 rear) with **Nitto NT01** tires (225/50 front, 245/45 rear).
